message:
deps: bump insta 1.42.1 -> 1.47.2

Minor bump within 1.x (snapshot-testing lib). insta is declared at the
workspace level but not currently consumed by any crate, so no Cargo.lock
entry and `cargo update -p insta` doesn't apply. The manifest pin is
updated so future consumers pick up the latest redactions/sorted-map
features.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -56,7 +56,7 @@ ctrlc = "3.5.2"
 criterion = { version = "0.8.2", features = ["html_reports"] }
 crossbeam-epoch = "0.9.18"
 hex = "0.4.3"
-insta = "1.42.1"
+insta = "1.47.2"
 libc = "0.2.180"
 memchr = "2.7.4"
 parking_lot = "0.12.3"
